notes: Only synthetic or founder-approved-anonymized fixtures belong here.
Never commit real customer/vendor identifiers, prices or discounts.
Each fixture: an input document + an expert-reviewed expected ground truth.

fixtures.description: Synthetic single-line gauge pressure transmitter RFQ with one deliberately missing critical field (wetted_material) and one hazardous-area conditional trigger.
Synthetic differential pressure transmitter RFQ that triggers the DP static-pressure conditional; static_pressure_or_overpressure is deliberately missing.
Synthetic gauge pressure transmitter with remote seal that triggers the remote-seal conditional; process temperature and accessories deliberately missing.
